name: paypal-plus-roxy-runner
description: Terminal Roxy runner for PayPal Plus flow.

scripts.test: node test/paypal-phone-store.test.js && node test/paypal-phone-sms-code-store.test.js && node test/paypal-phone-code.test.js && node test/hero-sms.test.js && node test/deferred-outlook-lease.test.js && node test/plus-store.test.js && node test/gpt-phone-account-store.test.js && node test/checkout-link-store.test.js && node test/runner-limit.test.js && node test/address-provider.test.js && node test/signup-profile.test.js && node test/roxy-window-recovery.test.js && node test/fill-password.test.js && node test/phone-flow.test.js && node test/checkout-conversion.test.js && node test/safe-output.test.js && node test/cpa-json.test.js && node test/cpa-oauth-upload.test.js && node test/run-events.test.js && node test/ui-server.test.js && node test/ui-job-manager.test.js && node test/signup-detour.test.js && node test/profile-and-checkout-recovery.test.js && node test/signup-page-choose-account.test.js && node test/signup-page-verification-target.test.js && node test/paypal-flow-detection.test.js && node test/paypal-risk.test.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && node src/cli.js db:init --db data/check.db && npm test && rm -f data/check.db data/check.db-shm data/check.db-wal
